reviews.comment:
Está bueno el lugar pero muy abandonado.. recorrimos la parte de atrás donde están los parques y está todo medio abandonado, me imagino xq no es temporada.. pero bueno, espero poder volver y ver si se puede disfrutar mejor

(Translated by Google)
The place is nice but very neglected. We walked around the back where the parks are and it's all kind of abandoned, I imagine because it's not peak season. But oh well, I hope to come back and see if it's more enjoyable.

reviews.comment:
Muy mala atención... Espere la comida 45 min. ( pechuga con puré) me traen la pechuga sin puré y 20 minutos después el puré Frio gongelado de heladera. Lo devolvi, espere 10 minutos nunca llego. Me retire. Ni la amabilidad de preguntarme por que me iba.Muy poco recomendable.

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service... I waited 45 minutes for my food (chicken breast with mashed potatoes). They brought me the chicken breast without the mashed potatoes, and 20 minutes later the mashed potatoes arrived cold, like they were straight from the refrigerator. I sent it back, waited another 10 minutes, and it never came. I left. They didn't even bother to ask why I was leaving. I would not recommend this place at all.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNSLTVLMGRnEAE
